description: CompositionGrey check pant made of 64% polyester and 34% viscose and 2% Lycra,has a zipper and button closure on the waistband in the front, belt loops on the waistband, two buttoned insert pockets at the back and two pocket son the frontFitSlimWash careMachine or hand wash separatelyUse mild detergent onlyDo not bleach or wringDry in shadeMedium ironStylish formal trousers for women with a slim fit and low rise, from arrow.
